summary: Completed frontend testing of OCB AI TITAN Enterprise Retail AI System. All 8 test features passed. Login, Dashboard, Hallo AI with personas, Inventory, Purchase Orders, Reports, and full sidebar navigation working correctly. UI is fully in Bahasa Indonesia.
critical_code_review_comments: All pages load correctly with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Hallo AI has 7 AI personas (CEO, CFO, COO, Marketing, Sales, Customer Service, Business Analyst) all functional
Chat history and suggested questions working in Hallo AI
Inventory page shows 7 products with stock quantities and status
PO000001 visible in Purchase Orders page with status 'Diterima'
Reports page shows sales data with proper filtering
All 16 sidebar navigation items working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend features verified working. Hallo AI chat with 7 personas functional. PO000001 exists. Inventory shows 7 products. Reports show sales data. All 16 sidebar menus navigable.

features_verified.login_authentication: PASS - Login with admin@ocb.com / admin123 successful, toast shows 'Selamat datang kembali!'
features_verified.dashboard_with_ai_insights: PASS - Dashboard shows AI Insights widget with Penjualan Turun 0.0%, Cabang Terbaik: Headquarters, Perlu Perhatian: Cabang 1
features_verified.hallo_ai_personas: PASS - 7 personas available: CEO, CFO, COO, Marketing, Sales, Customer Service, Business Analyst. Chat input and send button working. Chat history preserved.
features_verified.inventory_page: PASS - Shows 7 products: Kabel Data Type-C, Produk E2E Test (32 qty), Telkomsel 10GB (50 qty), etc. Tabs: Stok Cabang, Stok Menipis, Mutasi Stok, Transfer Cabang
features_verified.purchase_order_list: PASS - PO000001 visible with supplier TEST_Supplier_1772962643, Total Rp 3.250.000, Status: Diterima
features_verified.reports_page: PASS - Shows Total Penjualan Rp 80.000, Total Laba Rp -10.000, 3 Transaksi. Date filter working. Tabs: Penjualan, Produk, Stok, Cabang, Pelanggan
features_verified.sidebar_navigation: PASS - All 16 modules navigable: Dashboard, Hallo AI, Kasir, Produk, Stok, Pembelian, Supplier, Pelanggan, Keuangan, Akuntansi, Laporan, AI Bisnis, Cabang, Pengguna, Hak Akses, Pengaturan
features_verified.bahasa_indonesia_ui: PASS - All UI text in Indonesian: 'Selamat Datang', 'Masuk', 'Penjualan', 'Laporan', 'Pembelian', 'Stok & Inventori', etc.
